data.content: Implemented queued-view descendant retention so any beat shown because it is in a queue state now keeps its full descendant subtree visible, including shipped/abandoned children. Applied the same queued-filter behavior to both Knots and Beads backends, preserving direct-parent queries, and added regressions in knots-guardrails and beads-backend-coverage. Validation: bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/knots-guardrails.test.ts; bun run test -- src/lib/__tests__/beads-backend-coverage.test.ts; bunx tsc --noEmit; bun run test; bun run build; bun run lint (warnings only, no errors).
